---
ID: US-O6
Title: Wishlist Item Edit Modal with Full Design Style
Status: Missing
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-24
Scope: Tesknota (not Oliver App)
---

As a wishlist user  
I want item clicks to open a fully styled edit modal with current values prefilled  
So I can update wishlist entries quickly and safely.

Current state:
- No wishlist route/entity flow exists in this repository (`oliver-app`).
- Feature belongs to Tesknota scope.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Story is tracked in the correct repo backlog (Tesknota) with owner assignment.
- [ ] Clicking a wishlist item opens an edit modal using canonical modal components.
- [ ] Modal fields are pre-populated and persist updates correctly.
- [ ] Save/cancel flows and validation states are covered by automated tests.
